things.name: Shaolin Temple (Dengfeng)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage birthplace of Zen Buddhism and Shaolin Kung Fu

things.name: Henan Museum
things.description: China's finest provincial archaeology museum with Shang dynasty bronzes from Anyang

things.name: Yellow River Scenic Area
things.description: The Mother River of China with the Great Yu statue and Yellow River panorama

things.name: Longmen Grottoes (Luoyang)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Buddhist rock carvings - the Giant Buddha is 17m tall

things.name: Song Mountain (Songshan)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage sacred mountain with the Songyue Pagoda - oldest in China

things.name: Yinxu Shang Dynasty Ruins (Anyang)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage ancient capital of the Shang Dynasty with oracle bones

things.name: Erqi Square & February 7th Memorial Tower
things.description: Twin pagoda tower commemorating the 1923 railway strike martyrs

things.name: Gongyi Stone Caves
things.description: Northern Wei Buddhist caves with some of China's finest 5th-6th century sculpture

things.name: Xinzheng Huangdi故里 (Yellow Emperor Birthplace)
things.description: Birthplace of the mythical ancestor of the Chinese people

things.name: Hu La Tang (Pepper Soup)
things.description: Zhengzhou's famous breakfast - peppery lamb soup eaten with the local Shao Bing flatbread
